title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Alex Vinas - CoW Swap’s Multiparty Exec and Cross-Chain Coordination
description:
Talk by Alex Vinas (CoW Swap, Head of Partnerships).

In a world of endless chains and scattered liquidity, users face the impossible task of choosing the right risk, route, and timing for every trade. CoW Swap fixes this through multi-party coordination via a combinatorial batch auction across a cross-chain order book where multiple solvers compete. Each solution bundles a set of cross-chain ledger updates and a single onchain transaction, fully verifiable. By turning fragmented execution into coordinated price discovery, CoW Swap makes interoperability intents effortless—transforming complexity into seamless best execution.

Talk given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
